system.description:
◇ *magical*

This leg bone is always cold and covered in rime. It’s the bone of a witch who broke her leg and froze to death. It houses not a ghost, but a potent spirit of winter and cold.

When you **_first grip the bone_**, roll +CON: **on** **a 10+**, the spirit acknowledges you as master and you can wield the bone; **on a 7-9**, pick 1:

- Drop the bone; you can never wield it
- Endure as the spirit sucks away your heat—take 2d4 damage (ignores armor) and mark *weakened*—but you then master the spirit and can wield the bone.

**On a 6-**, the spirit sucks away your heat—take 2d4 damage (ignores armor) and mark *weak**ened*—and you can never wield the bone.

When you **_wield the bone as a weapon_** (*hand*, *crude*, *magical*, ignores armor) it deals 2d4 damage instead of your normal damage, sucking the warmth from your foe.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.HOWpYxmR8Q44qS3E]{Spirits of the wild}.*
